elements.original_description: A simple human head silhouette in profile, with a glowing brain inside. The brain emits soft yellow lightwaves, symbolizing subconscious activity. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: A high-quality conceptual illustration. A simple human head silhouette shown in profile, black against a neutral background. Inside the silhouette is a glowing brain, emitting soft, radiant yellow lightwaves that pulse outward, symbolizing subconscious mental activity. The style is clean, modern, and symbolic. The lighting is ethereal, focused on the glowing brain. Absolutely no text, letters, numbers, or watermarks.
